modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble accessing Microsoft Teams in web browser on Windows.

full_description_text: 
User want to access MS Teams web app. They using Windows and Office 365. They not know how to do it. Need help with this issue.
